zh.lifeSummary: 當John Atte Halle於大約1295年出生在英國波克夏時，他的父親William Atte Halle22歲，母親Annabel England17歲。他於大約1318年與Margery Le Bayllol在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1361年在英國波克夏哈維爾享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Atte Halle于大约1295年出生在英国波克夏时，他的父亲William Atte Halle22岁，母亲Annabel England17岁。他于大约1318年与Margery Le Bayllol在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1361年在英国波克夏哈維爾享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Halle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Rejean, Marcel, Andre, Arianne, Armand, Camille, Fernand, Gaspard, Laurent.
German and English: variant of   Hall  .
French (also Hallé): topographic name from Old French halle ‘covered market’, from halla ‘covered room’.

variants.name: Hall
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, German, Norwegian, and Danish: from Middle English hall (Old English heall), Middle High German halle, Old Norse hǫll all meaning ‘hall’ (a spacious residence), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in or near a hall or an occupational name for a servant employed at a hall. In some cases it may be a habitational name from any of the places called with this word, which in some parts of Germany and Austria in the Middle Ages also denoted a salt mine. Hall is one of the commonest and most widely distributed of English surnames, bearing witness to the importance of the hall as a feature of the medieval village. The English surname has been established in Ireland since the 14th century, and, according to MacLysaght, has become numerous in Ulster since the 17th century.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from hall ‘hall’ (a spacious residence), or a habitational name from a placename containing the element hall ‘rock’ (from Old Norse hallr).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 何 and 賀, see   He   1 and 2.

variants.name: Hallee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Armand, Fernand, Henri, Napoleon, Renald, Urbain.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Atte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Atte Halle was born about 1295, in Berkshire, England, his father, William Atte Halle, was 22 and his mother, Annabel England, was 17. He married Margery Le Bayllol about 1318, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1361, in Harwell, Berkshire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Atte Halle est né environ 1295, à Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, William Atte Halle, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Annabel England, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Margery Le Bayllol environ 1318, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1361, à Harwell, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Atte Halle um 1295 in Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Atte Halle 22 und seine Mutter Annabel England 17. Er hat um 1318 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Margery Le Bayllol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1361 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Harwell, Berkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Atte Halle è nato il circa 1295 nel Berkshire, England, il suo padre, William Atte Halle, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Annabel England, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Margery Le Bayllol circa 1318, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1361, nel Harwell, Berkshire, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Atte Halleが約1295年にイギリスバークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Atte Halleは22歳，母Annabel Englandは17歳であった。約1318年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでMargery Le Bayllolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1361年にイギリスバークシュアイアハーウエルで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Atte Halle(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Atte Halle(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Annabel England(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Margery Le Bayllol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1361년 영국 버크실르 하웰에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Atte Halle nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Atte Halle, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Annabel England, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Le Bayllol aproximadamente 1318, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1361, em Harwell, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Atte Halle родился около 1295 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Atte Halle было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Annabel England, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Le Bayllol около 1318 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1361 г. в местности харвелл, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Atte Halle nació aproximadamente 1295, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Atte Halle, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Annabel England, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Margery Le Bayllol aproximadamente 1318, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1361, en Harwell, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
